chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text: Any party aggrieved by a board decision on pilotage rates, after exhausting all administrative remedies, may appeal the order to a court.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.067 — Appeal of Board Decision

Any party aggrieved by a board decision on pilotage rates, after exhausting all administrative remedies, may appeal the order to a court.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: Any party aggrieved by a board decision on pilotage rates, after exhausting all administrative remedies, may appeal the order to a court.
